subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of my heart and Thou Who art remembered in my soul! The breezes of love that wafted from the gardens [3.5s]... ...Thou hast asked about affection and reconciliation, in the case of Mirza .... This matter was mentioned in the Holy Presence. This is what the tongue of our All-Merciful Lord uttered in response… My blessings, my salutations, and my greetings to the Stars of the heaven of Thy proof and the Hands of Thy Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی و المذکور فی قلبی قد سرتنی نسمات الحب التی سرت من حدائق... اصلّی و اسلّم و اکبّر علی انجم سمآء عرفانک
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
